headline: Dividend-paying restaurant stock stumbles as gas prices surge
summary: Restaurant stocks have been a rough ride lately. Since tensions in the Middle East flared, the sector has quietly been losing ground, and Wall Street is starting to pay close attention. The reason is simple. When gas prices rise, people have less money left over for eating out. It's one of the most ...

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Darden Restaurants, Raises Price Target to $262
